title: sauvagesia erecta var. coriacea
intro: Sauvagesia erecta var. coriacea, commonly known as "Rau má" or "Sauvagesia", is a plant species native to Vietnam and other parts of Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sauvagesia erecta var. coriacea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and exhibit antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Herbal preparations of Sauvagesia erecta var. coriacea include decoctions, infusions, and capsules, often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
